CVE-2022-38493.title: Rhonabwy 0.9.99 through 1.1.x before 1.1.7 doesn't check the RSA  ...
CVE-2022-38493.summary: Rhonabwy 0.9.99 through 1.1.x before 1.1.7 doesn't check the RSA private key length before RSA-OAEP decryption. This allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service via a crafted JWE (JSON Web Encryption) token.
